title: Heft oxlint Plugin Options Configuration
description: This schema describes the "options" field that can be specified in heft.json when loading "@rushstack/heft-oxlint-plugin".

configFilePath.title: Config File Path
configFilePath.description: An optional path (relative to the project root) to an oxlint configuration file (e.g. ".oxlintrc.json"). Maps to oxlint's --config. If omitted, oxlint will search for a configuration file using its default resolution.

tsConfigFilePath.title: TypeScript Config File Path
tsConfigFilePath.description: Override the TypeScript config used for import resolution. Maps to oxlint's --tsconfig.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description: The list of file or folder paths (relative to the project root) that oxlint should lint. Defaults to ["src"].

allow.title: Allow
allow.description: Allow (suppress) the listed rules or categories. Maps to oxlint's --allow (-A).

warn.title: Warn
warn.description: Warn on the listed rules or categories. Maps to oxlint's --warn (-W).

deny.title: Deny
deny.description: Deny (error on) the listed rules or categories. Maps to oxlint's --deny (-D).

disableUnicornPlugin.description: Disable the unicorn plugin, which is on by default. Maps to --disable-unicorn-plugin.

disableOxcPlugin.description: Disable oxc unique rules, which are on by default. Maps to --disable-oxc-plugin.

disableTypeScriptPlugin.description: Disable the TypeScript plugin, which is on by default. Maps to --disable-typescript-plugin.

importPlugin.description: Enable the import plugin. Maps to --import-plugin.

reactPlugin.description: Enable the react plugin. Maps to --react-plugin.

jsdocPlugin.description: Enable the jsdoc plugin. Maps to --jsdoc-plugin.

jestPlugin.description: Enable the Jest plugin. Maps to --jest-plugin.

vitestPlugin.description: Enable the Vitest plugin. Maps to --vitest-plugin.

jsxA11yPlugin.description: Enable the JSX-a11y plugin. Maps to --jsx-a11y-plugin.

nextjsPlugin.description: Enable the Next.js plugin. Maps to --nextjs-plugin.

reactPerfPlugin.description: Enable the React performance plugin. Maps to --react-perf-plugin.

promisePlugin.description: Enable the promise plugin. Maps to --promise-plugin.

nodePlugin.description: Enable the node plugin. Maps to --node-plugin.

vuePlugin.description: Enable the vue plugin. Maps to --vue-plugin.

alwaysFix.title: Always Fix
alwaysFix.description: If set to true, fix all encountered rule violations where the violated rule provides a fixer, regardless of if the "--fix" command-line argument is provided. Maps to oxlint's --fix. When running in production mode, fixes will be disabled regardless of this setting.

fixSuggestions.description: Apply auto-fixable suggestions. Maps to --fix-suggestions. Disabled in production mode.

fixDangerously.description: Apply dangerous fixes and suggestions. Maps to --fix-dangerously. Disabled in production mode.

ignorePath.description: Specify the file to use as your .eslintignore. Maps to --ignore-path.

ignorePattern.description: Patterns of files to ignore. Maps to --ignore-pattern.

noIgnore.description: Disable excluding files from ignore files/patterns. Maps to --no-ignore.

quiet.description: Disable reporting on warnings; only errors are reported. Maps to --quiet.

denyWarnings.description: Ensure warnings produce a non-zero exit code. Maps to --deny-warnings.

maxWarnings.description: Warning threshold that forces an error exit status when exceeded. Maps to --max-warnings.

threads.description: Number of threads to use. Set to 1 to use a single CPU core. Maps to --threads.

noErrorOnUnmatchedPattern.description: Do not error when no files are selected for linting. Maps to --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern.

disableNestedConfig.description: Disable automatic loading of nested configuration files. Maps to --disable-nested-config.

typeAware.description: Enable rules that require type information. Maps to --type-aware.

typeCheck.description: Enable experimental type checking (includes TypeScript compiler diagnostics). Maps to --type-check.

reportUnusedDisableDirectives.description: Report unused inline disable directives. Maps to --report-unused-disable-directives.

reportUnusedDisableDirectivesSeverity.description: Report unused inline disable directives at the specified severity. Maps to --report-unused-disable-directives-severity. Mutually exclusive with reportUnusedDisableDirectives.

sarifLogPath.title: SARIF Log Path
sarifLogPath.description: If specified, a log of all findings will be emitted in the Static Analysis Results Interchange Format (https://sarifweb.azurewebsites.net/) at the provided path, relative to the project root. This is produced by an additional oxlint invocation using --format=sarif.
